description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock with a smooth, curved contour, paired with a robust metal receiver and barrel assembly. The barrel is perforated with a series of cooling holes along its shroud, giving it a distinctive, ventilated appearance. A large, round drum magazine is mounted beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity feeding system. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly visible, and the rifle is equipped with simple iron sights for aiming. The metal components have a matte black finish, contrasting with the warm brown of the wooden stock. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century military firearms, combining durability with utilitarian aesthetics.
description: A vintage-style rifle with a wooden stock, ventilated metal barrel shroud, and a prominent drum magazine. The metal parts are matte black, contrasting with the brown wood.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, ventilated barrel shroud, and drum magazine.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the circular drum magazine and the barrel's muzzle, with the iron sight visible on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal receiver, and the drum magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden stock's end and the back of the receiver, with the drum magazine partially visible.
